basics.name: workspaceName
basics.label: Log Analytics Workspace Name
basics.toolTip: The name of the existing Log Analytics workspace that diagnostic logs will be sent to.

validations.message: Workspace name must be between 4 and 63 characters and can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.

basics.name: location
basics.label: Region
basics.toolTip: The Azure region to deploy the policy resources into.

options.text: Select the resource types you want to automatically apply diagnostic settings to. Policies will be assigned at subscription scope, meaning any new resources of the selected types will also have diagnostic settings applied automatically.

elements.name: enableKeyVault
elements.label: Azure Key Vault
elements.toolTip: Enables diagnostic settings for Key Vault, capturing AuditEvent logs.

elements.name: enableNSG
elements.label: Network Security Groups (NSG)
elements.toolTip: Enables diagnostic settings for NSGs, capturing NetworkSecurityGroupEvent and NetworkSecurityGroupRuleCounter logs.

elements.name: enableStorage
elements.label: Storage Accounts
elements.toolTip: Enables diagnostic settings for Storage Accounts, capturing read, write, and delete logs for blob, queue, table, and file services.

elements.name: enableSQL
elements.label: SQL Databases
elements.toolTip: Enables diagnostic settings for SQL Databases (excluding master), capturing security audit events, errors, timeouts, blocks, and deadlocks.

outputs.enableDiagnosticPolicies: [union(if(steps('diagnosticPolicies').enableKeyVault, array('AzureKeyVault'), array()), if(steps('diagnosticPolicies').enableNSG, array('AzureNetworkSecurityGroup'), array()), if(steps('diagnosticPolicies').enableStorage, array('AzureStorageAccount'), array()), if(steps('diagnosticPolicies').enableSQL, array('AzureSqlDatabase'), array()))]
